---
title: "Norming Study — Pilot C"
date: today
render_with_liquid: false
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    page-layout: full
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    toc-location: left
    embed-resources: true
    smooth-scroll: true
    fig-responsive: true
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 220px
      body-width: 1400px
      margin-width: 0px
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
import pandas as pd, numpy as np, os, textwrap
import plotly.graph_objects as go
import plotly.io as pio
from plotly.subplots import make_subplots
from IPython.display import display, HTML

pio.renderers.default = 'notebook'

PILOT       = 'c_pilot_prolific'
RESULTS_DIR = f'../../results/norming_study/{PILOT}'
os.makedirs(RESULTS_DIR, exist_ok=True)

C = {'joint-aw': '#1F5572', 'joint-wa': '#5C8FA8',
     'linear-aw': '#D69A57', 'linear-wa': '#A8A096'}
C_QUAD = {'AW': '#1F5572', 'ANW': '#5C8FA8', 'NAW': '#D69A57', 'NANW': '#A8A096'}
BG, GRID_COL, PAD = '#F3EFE5', '#E8E2D5', 4
AXIS_STYLE = dict(showgrid=True, gridcolor=GRID_COL, gridwidth=1,
                  linecolor='#464548', linewidth=1, ticks='outside', tickcolor='#464548')
def wrap(t, w=55): return '<br>'.join(textwrap.wrap(str(t), w))

def prep(df):
    df = df.copy()
    is_grid = df['trial_type'] == 'whyask-grid-trial'
    df['condition'] = (df['trial_type']
                       .map({'whyask-grid-trial': 'joint', 'whyask-linear-trial': 'linear'})
                       + '-' + df['axisOrder'].str.lower())
    df['p_able']    = df['abilityResponse'].astype(float)
    df['p_willing'] = df['willingnessResponse'].astype(float)
    if is_grid.any():
        df.loc[is_grid, 'p_able']    = (df.loc[is_grid, 'able_willing_count']
                                         + df.loc[is_grid, 'able_not_willing_count'])
        df.loc[is_grid, 'p_willing'] = (df.loc[is_grid, 'able_willing_count']
                                         + df.loc[is_grid, 'not_able_willing_count'])
    for col in ['dof1', 'dof2_giv', 'dof2_gnot']:
        df[col] = np.nan
    df['dof1_lbl'] = ''; df['dof2_lbl'] = ''; df['dof2n_lbl'] = ''
    for ax, d1, d2g, d2n in [
        ('AW', 'P(able)',    'P(willing|able)',   'P(willing|¬able)'),
        ('WA', 'P(willing)', 'P(able|willing)',   'P(able|¬willing)'),
    ]:
        m = is_grid & (df['axisOrder'] == ax)
        if m.any():
            df.loc[m, 'dof1']      = df.loc[m, 'sx']  / 10 * 100
            df.loc[m, 'dof2_giv']  = df.loc[m, 'syR'] / 10 * 100
            df.loc[m, 'dof2_gnot'] = df.loc[m, 'syL'] / 10 * 100
            df.loc[m, 'dof1_lbl']  = d1
            df.loc[m, 'dof2_lbl']  = d2g
            df.loc[m, 'dof2n_lbl'] = d2n
    df['_q'] = df['actionPhrase'].apply(lambda t: wrap(f'Can you {t}?'))
    if 'vignette' in df.columns:
        df['_v'] = df['vignette'].apply(wrap)
    else:
        df['_v'] = df['_q']
    return df

trials = prep(pd.read_csv(f'../../data/norming_study/processed/{PILOT}/trials.csv'))
aw_m = trials[trials['axisOrder'] == 'AW']
wa_m = trials[trials['axisOrder'] == 'WA']
```

## Overview

```{python}
print(f'subjects: {trials["subjectID"].nunique()}  |  trials: {len(trials)}')
print()
print('n_trials by condition:')
print(trials.groupby('condition').size().to_string())
print()
print('unique items per condition:')
print(trials.groupby('condition')['itemID'].nunique().to_string())
print()
rt = trials['trialRT'] / 1000
print(f'trial RT: median={rt.median():.1f}s  IQR={rt.quantile(.25):.1f}–{rt.quantile(.75):.1f}s  max={rt.max():.1f}s')
```

## Probability Estimates

```{python}
joint = trials[trials['trial_type'] == 'whyask-grid-trial']

print(f"P(able):    {trials['p_able'].mean():.1f}")
print(f"P(willing): {trials['p_willing'].mean():.1f}")

if len(joint):
    print()
    print(f"P(AW):   {joint['able_willing_count'].mean():.1f}")
    print(f"P(ANW):  {joint['able_not_willing_count'].mean():.1f}")
    print(f"P(NAW):  {joint['not_able_willing_count'].mean():.1f}")
    print(f"P(NANW): {joint['not_able_not_willing_count'].mean():.1f}")
```

## Figure 1 — P(able) × P(willing)

```{python}
item_stats = (trials.groupby('itemID')
              .agg(p_able_m=('p_able', 'mean'), p_willing_m=('p_willing', 'mean'),
                   n=('subjectID', 'nunique'), phrase=('actionPhrase', 'first'),
                   _v=('_v', 'first'), _q=('_q', 'first'))
              .reset_index())

fig = make_subplots(rows=2, cols=2,
    column_widths=[0.8, 0.2], row_heights=[0.2, 0.8],
    shared_xaxes=True, shared_yaxes=True,
    horizontal_spacing=0.02, vertical_spacing=0.02)

for cond in sorted(trials['condition'].unique()):
    g = trials[trials['condition'] == cond]
    fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
        x=g['p_able'], y=g['p_willing'], mode='markers', name=cond,
        marker=dict(color=C.get(cond, '#888'), size=4, opacity=0.45, line=dict(width=0)),
        customdata=np.stack([g['_v'], g['_q']], axis=1),
        hovertemplate='<b>%{customdata[0]}</b><br>%{customdata[1]}<br>able: %{x}  willing: %{y}<extra></extra>',
        legendgroup=cond,
    ), row=2, col=1)

fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
    x=item_stats['p_able_m'], y=item_stats['p_willing_m'], mode='markers', name='item mean',
    marker=dict(color='#1a1a1a', size=7, opacity=0.85, line=dict(color='white', width=1)),
    customdata=np.stack([item_stats['_v'], item_stats['_q'], item_stats['n']], axis=1),
    hovertemplate='<b>%{customdata[0]}</b><br>%{customdata[1]}<br>P(able)=%{x:.1f}  P(willing)=%{y:.1f}  (n=%{customdata[2]})<extra></extra>',
), row=2, col=1)

fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=[0,100], y=[0,100], mode='lines',
    line=dict(color='#464548', width=0.8, dash='dash'), opacity=0.25,
    showlegend=False, hoverinfo='skip'), row=2, col=1)

for cond in sorted(trials['condition'].unique()):
    g = trials[trials['condition'] == cond]; color = C.get(cond, '#888')
    fig.add_trace(go.Histogram(x=g['p_able'],    xbins=dict(start=0,end=100,size=5),
        marker_color=color, opacity=0.65, legendgroup=cond, showlegend=False), row=1, col=1)
    fig.add_trace(go.Histogram(y=g['p_willing'], ybins=dict(start=0,end=100,size=5),
        marker_color=color, opacity=0.65, legendgroup=cond, showlegend=False), row=2, col=2)

fig.update_layout(
    width=560, height=560, plot_bgcolor=BG, paper_bgcolor='white',
    margin=dict(l=60, r=20, t=20, b=60),
    font=dict(family='Avenir, Helvetica Neue, Arial'),
    barmode='stack',
    hoverlabel=dict(bgcolor='rgba(255,255,255,0.45)', bordercolor='#464548',
                    font=dict(family='Avenir, Helvetica Neue, Arial', size=13, color='#222'), namelength=0),
    legend=dict(orientation='h', yanchor='bottom', y=1.02, xanchor='left', x=0),
)
fig.update_xaxes(range=[-PAD,100+PAD], title_text='P(able)',    **AXIS_STYLE, row=2, col=1)
fig.update_yaxes(range=[-PAD,100+PAD], title_text='P(willing)', **AXIS_STYLE, row=2, col=1)
fig.update_xaxes(showticklabels=False, showgrid=False, row=1, col=1)
fig.update_yaxes(showticklabels=False, showgrid=False, row=2, col=2)
fig.show()
```

## Figure 1b — Primary × Conditional

```{python}
panels = [
    ('aw', ['joint-aw', 'linear-aw'], 'P(able)', 'P(willing|able)'),
    ('wa', ['joint-wa', 'linear-wa'], 'P(willing)', 'P(able|willing)'),
]

def panel_data(conds):
    rows = []
    for cond in [c for c in conds if c in trials['condition'].unique()]:
        g = trials[trials['condition'] == cond].copy()
        if 'joint' in cond:
            g['x'], g['y'] = g['dof1'], g['dof2_giv']
        elif cond == 'linear-aw':
            g['x'], g['y'] = g['p_able'], g['p_willing']
        else:
            g['x'], g['y'] = g['p_willing'], g['p_able']
        rows.append(g[['_v', '_q', 'x', 'y', 'condition', 'itemID']])
    return pd.concat(rows) if rows else pd.DataFrame()

fig1b = make_subplots(rows=2, cols=5,
    column_widths=[0.37, 0.07, 0.08, 0.37, 0.07],
    row_heights=[0.15, 0.85],
    horizontal_spacing=0.02, vertical_spacing=0.02)

panel_cols = [(1, 2), (4, 5)]

for pi, ((sc, mc), (ax, conds, x_lbl, y_lbl)) in enumerate(zip(panel_cols, panels)):
    df = panel_data(conds)
    if df.empty: continue

    for cond in conds:
        g = df[df['condition'] == cond]
        if g.empty: continue
        color = C.get(cond, '#888')
        fig1b.add_trace(go.Scatter(
            x=g['x'], y=g['y'], mode='markers', name=cond,
            marker=dict(color=color, size=4, opacity=0.45, line=dict(width=0)),
            customdata=np.stack([g['_v'], g['_q']], axis=1),
            hovertemplate='<b>%{customdata[0]}</b><br>%{customdata[1]}<br>x=%{x:.1f}  y=%{y:.1f}<extra></extra>',
            legendgroup=cond, showlegend=(pi == 0),
        ), row=2, col=sc)
        fig1b.add_trace(go.Histogram(x=g['x'], xbins=dict(start=0,end=100,size=5),
            marker_color=color, opacity=0.65, legendgroup=cond, showlegend=False), row=1, col=sc)
        fig1b.add_trace(go.Histogram(y=g['y'], ybins=dict(start=0,end=100,size=5),
            marker_color=color, opacity=0.65, legendgroup=cond, showlegend=False), row=2, col=mc)

    im = df.groupby('itemID')[['x','y']].mean().reset_index()
    fig1b.add_trace(go.Scatter(
        x=im['x'], y=im['y'], mode='markers', name='item mean',
        marker=dict(color='#1a1a1a', size=7, opacity=0.85, line=dict(color='white', width=1)),
        legendgroup='item mean', showlegend=(pi == 0), hoverinfo='skip',
    ), row=2, col=sc)
    fig1b.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=[0,100], y=[0,100], mode='lines',
        line=dict(color='#464548', width=0.8, dash='dash'), opacity=0.25,
        showlegend=False, hoverinfo='skip'), row=2, col=sc)

    fig1b.update_xaxes(range=[-PAD,100+PAD], title_text=x_lbl, **AXIS_STYLE, row=2, col=sc)
    fig1b.update_yaxes(range=[-PAD,100+PAD], title_text=y_lbl, **AXIS_STYLE, row=2, col=sc)
    fig1b.update_xaxes(showticklabels=False, showgrid=False, row=1, col=sc)
    fig1b.update_yaxes(showticklabels=False, showgrid=False, row=2, col=mc)

fig1b.update_layout(
    width=960, height=520, plot_bgcolor=BG, paper_bgcolor='white',
    barmode='stack',
    margin=dict(l=60, r=20, t=30, b=60),
    font=dict(family='Avenir, Helvetica Neue, Arial'),
    hoverlabel=dict(bgcolor='rgba(255,255,255,0.45)', bordercolor='#464548',
                    font=dict(size=13, color='#222'), namelength=0),
    legend=dict(orientation='h', yanchor='bottom', y=1.04, xanchor='left', x=0),
)
fig1b.show()
```

## Item Table

```{python}
joint = trials[trials['trial_type'] == 'whyask-grid-trial']
aw_j  = joint[joint['axisOrder'] == 'AW']
wa_j  = joint[joint['axisOrder'] == 'WA']

group_cols = ['itemID', 'actionPhrase'] + (['vignette'] if 'vignette' in trials.columns else [])

base = (trials.groupby(group_cols)
        .agg(p_able=('p_able', 'mean'), p_willing=('p_willing', 'mean'),
             n=('subjectID', 'count'))
        .round(1))

aw_conds = (aw_j.groupby('itemID')
            .agg(**{'P(W|A)':  ('dof2_giv',  'mean'), 'P(W|¬A)': ('dof2_gnot', 'mean')})
            .round(1))
wa_conds = (wa_j.groupby('itemID')
            .agg(**{'P(A|W)':  ('dof2_giv',  'mean'), 'P(A|¬W)': ('dof2_gnot', 'mean')})
            .round(1))
quads = (joint.groupby('itemID')
         .agg(AW=('able_willing_count', 'mean'), ANW=('able_not_willing_count', 'mean'),
              NAW=('not_able_willing_count', 'mean'), NANW=('not_able_not_willing_count', 'mean'))
         .round(1))

item_table = (base.join(aw_conds).join(wa_conds).join(quads)
              .reset_index().sort_values('p_able').reset_index(drop=True))

tid = 'item-tbl'
display(HTML(f'''
<style>
#{tid} {{ border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 13px; width: 100%; }}
#{tid} th {{ position: sticky; top: 0; background: #f0ede8; padding: 6px 10px;
              border-bottom: 2px solid #ccc; cursor: pointer; user-select: none; white-space: nowrap; }}
#{tid} th:hover {{ background: #e4e0d8; }}
#{tid} th.asc::after  {{ content: " ▲"; font-size: 10px; }}
#{tid} th.desc::after {{ content: " ▼"; font-size: 10px; }}
#{tid} td {{ padding: 4px 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid #eee; }}
#{tid} tr:hover td {{ background: #fafaf7; }}
</style>
<div style="height:420px; overflow-y:auto">
{item_table.to_html(index=False, na_rep="—", table_id=tid)}
</div>
<script>
(function() {{
  var tbl = document.getElementById('{tid}');
  var ths = Array.from(tbl.querySelectorAll('th'));
  var sortCol = -1, asc = true;
  ths.forEach(function(th, i) {{
    th.addEventListener('click', function() {{
      asc = (sortCol === i) ? !asc : true;
      sortCol = i;
      ths.forEach(function(h) {{ h.className = ''; }});
      th.className = asc ? 'asc' : 'desc';
      var tbody = tbl.querySelector('tbody');
      var rows = Array.from(tbody.querySelectorAll('tr'));
      rows.sort(function(a, b) {{
        var av = a.cells[i].textContent.trim();
        var bv = b.cells[i].textContent.trim();
        if (av === '—') return 1; if (bv === '—') return -1;
        var an = parseFloat(av), bn = parseFloat(bv);
        var cmp = (!isNaN(an) && !isNaN(bn)) ? an - bn : av.localeCompare(bv);
        return asc ? cmp : -cmp;
      }});
      rows.forEach(function(r) {{ tbody.appendChild(r); }});
    }});
  }});
}})();
</script>
'''))
```

## Figure 2 — Joint Conditional Structure

D = P(secondary|primary) − P(secondary|¬primary).

```{python}
joint = trials[trials['trial_type'] == 'whyask-grid-trial'].copy()

if len(joint) == 0:
    print('no joint trials yet')
else:
    joint['D'] = joint['dof2_giv'] - joint['dof2_gnot']
    joint_conds = [c for c in ['joint-aw', 'joint-wa'] if c in joint['condition'].unique()]
    ncols = max(len(joint_conds), 1)

    fig2 = make_subplots(rows=1, cols=ncols, horizontal_spacing=0.12,
        subplot_titles=joint_conds if joint_conds else ['no joint data'])

    for ci, cond in enumerate(joint_conds, start=1):
        g = joint[joint['condition'] == cond]
        d1 = g['dof1_lbl'].iloc[0]
        x_lbl = g['dof2_lbl'].iloc[0]
        y_lbl = g['dof2n_lbl'].iloc[0]

        fig2.add_trace(go.Scatter(
            x=g['dof2_giv'], y=g['dof2_gnot'], mode='markers',
            marker=dict(color=C[cond], size=6, opacity=0.75, line=dict(color='white', width=0.5)),
            customdata=np.stack([g['_v'], g['_q'], g['D'].round(1), g['dof1'].round(1)], axis=1),
            hovertemplate=(
                '<b>%{customdata[0]}</b><br>%{customdata[1]}<br>'
                f'{d1} = %{{customdata[3]}}<br>D = %{{customdata[2]}}<extra></extra>'
            ),
            showlegend=False,
        ), row=1, col=ci)
        fig2.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=[0,100], y=[0,100], mode='lines',
            line=dict(color='#464548', width=0.8, dash='dash'), opacity=0.3,
            showlegend=False, hoverinfo='skip'), row=1, col=ci)
        fig2.update_xaxes(range=[-PAD,100+PAD], title_text=x_lbl, **AXIS_STYLE, row=1, col=ci)
        fig2.update_yaxes(range=[-PAD,100+PAD], title_text=y_lbl, **AXIS_STYLE, row=1, col=ci)

    fig2.update_layout(width=500*ncols, height=480, plot_bgcolor=BG, paper_bgcolor='white',
        margin=dict(l=70, r=20, t=60, b=80), font=dict(family='Avenir, Helvetica Neue, Arial'),
        hoverlabel=dict(bgcolor='rgba(255,255,255,0.45)', bordercolor='#464548',
                        font=dict(size=13, color='#222'), namelength=0))
    fig2.show()

    # D = P(secondary|primary) − P(secondary|¬primary): how much primary status shifts secondary estimate
    for cond in joint_conds:
        g = joint[joint['condition'] == cond]
        print(f"{cond}  mean D = {g['D'].mean():.1f}  (sd={g['D'].std():.1f})")
```

## Figure 3 — Joint DOF Distributions

Distribution of each degree of freedom for joint conditions.

```{python}
joint = trials[trials['trial_type'] == 'whyask-grid-trial'].copy()

if len(joint) == 0:
    print('no joint trials yet')
else:
    joint_conds = [c for c in ['joint-aw', 'joint-wa'] if c in joint['condition'].unique()]

    for cond in joint_conds:
        g = joint[joint['condition'] == cond]
        d1_lbl  = g['dof1_lbl'].iloc[0]
        d2_lbl  = g['dof2_lbl'].iloc[0]
        d2n_lbl = g['dof2n_lbl'].iloc[0]

        fig3 = make_subplots(rows=1, cols=3, horizontal_spacing=0.1,
            subplot_titles=[d1_lbl, d2_lbl, d2n_lbl])

        for ci, (var, color) in enumerate([
            ('dof1',      C[cond]),
            ('dof2_giv',  C_QUAD['ANW']),
            ('dof2_gnot', C_QUAD['NAW']),
        ], start=1):
            fig3.add_trace(go.Histogram(
                x=g[var], xbins=dict(start=0, end=100, size=10),
                marker_color=color, opacity=0.85, showlegend=False,
            ), row=1, col=ci)
            fig3.update_xaxes(range=[-PAD,100+PAD], title_text='%', **AXIS_STYLE, row=1, col=ci)
            fig3.update_yaxes(**AXIS_STYLE, row=1, col=ci)

        fig3.update_layout(width=900, height=300, plot_bgcolor=BG, paper_bgcolor='white',
            title_text=cond, title_x=0.5, title_font_size=13,
            margin=dict(l=50, r=20, t=60, b=60), font=dict(family='Avenir, Helvetica Neue, Arial'))
        fig3.show()
```
